concepts.name: Migrate date handling from moment to date-fns
concepts.summary: Replace moment with date-fns across src/utils/dates.ts, src/reports/monthly.ts, src/schedule/cron.ts, and src/billing/invoice.ts, then drop moment from package.json.
reasoning: Chose date-fns because it is tree-shakeable (per-function imports reduce bundle size) and actively maintained.
Rejected staying on moment because the library is in maintenance mode and its non-tree-shakeable monolithic import inflates the bundle.
Migrated call sites to the equivalent date-fns functions (format, startOfMonth, endOfMonth, addDays, parseISO, differenceInDays) preserving the existing behavior.
Verified the migration with pnpm typecheck before finishing.
